Home.heroTitle: Innovating the Future with  Artificial Intelligence
Home.heroDescription: Inova AI is a solution provider solving problems across daily life and industries with advanced technology—from the 'Sniff by Hatch' platform for pet families to hospital systems, GMP document automation, and industrial 'FEM & AI' optimization.
Home.coreDescription: We leverage AI to solve complex challenges across multiple industries.
Home.service1Desc: A revolutionary AI platform for early detection of health concerns through medical questionnaires used in hospitals and image analysis.
Home.service2Desc: An AI-assisted diagnostic system optimized for veterinary clinics to support accurate diagnoses.
Home.service3Desc: Optimizing pharmaceutical CSV workflows and automating the GMP documentation process.
Home.service4Desc: Integrating the Finite Element Method with AI to accelerate industrial design and simulation accuracy.
Home.service5Desc: Deploying intelligent AI agents to improve inefficient workflows and maximize productivity.

Automation.heroDescription: Optimize your business processes with intelligent AI agents. Reduce repetitive tasks and focus on what matters most.
Automation.feature1Desc: We build customized AI agents that intelligently handle repetitive tasks.
Automation.feature2Desc: We analyze inefficient workflows and automate them in the most efficient way.
Automation.feature3Desc: We monitor automated task performance in real-time and provide analytical reports.

Footer.description: From veterinarians to simulation experts, specialists from entirely different fields collaborate without boundaries—a boundary-breaking startup obsessively exploring the new possibilities of AI to resolve complex industrial challenges.
Footer.address: Room 204, 2nd Floor, 4 Daeha 2-gil, Maengdong-myeon, Eumseong-gun, Chungcheongbuk-do, Korea

About.heroDescription: As an AI-native startup, we redefine pet healthcare. We also encourage AI adoption in the pharmaceutical and manufacturing industries, bridging the gap to support professional-grade work across all sectors.
About.missionDesc1: Detecting health issues early is the key to longevity. We believe every pet owner deserves access to immediate, accurate health insights without waiting for an appointment.
About.missionDesc2: By combining advanced computer vision with the knowledge of experienced veterinarians, we create a safety net that never sleeps.
About.vetLedDesc: Co-founded by a practicing veterinarian (DVM) to ensure clinical validity in every algorithm we build.
About.petCentricDesc: Everything we build focuses on increasing industrial efficiency, minimizing stress and maximizing effectiveness.
About.journeyNowDesc: Launch of Sniff by Hatch beta.
About.journeyNextDesc: Enhancing stability for veterinarians and pet owners.
About.journeyFutureDesc: Promoting global service plans targeting the US and Europe.

Technology.heroDesc: We combine state-of-the-art Computer Vision with Large Language Models to simulate a veterinary consultation.
Technology.cvDesc: Our fine-tuned CNN/Transformer hybrid models are trained on a proprietary dataset of dermatological and dental conditions in dogs and cats.
Technology.llmDesc: We use advanced LLMs to conduct dynamic medical interviews (anamnesis) and synthesize visual findings into a coherent report.
Technology.llmFeature2: Medical jargon translation for pet owners
Technology.backendDesc: Powered by FastAPI and microservices architecture to ensure low-latency responses and high availability.
Technology.privacyDesc: We adhere to strict data privacy standards. Images are processed anonymously where possible, and personal data is encrypted at rest and in transit.
Technology.patentSectionDesc: INOVA.AI has secured patents for our core technology, protecting our unique approach to combining biosignals with questionnaire data.
Technology.patentTitleEn: "AI-based Pet Health Assessment System using Questionnaire and Biosignals"
Technology.patentTitleKo: (인공지능 기반 반려동물 건강 상태 분석 시스템)
